  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/drawterm         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    net/drawterm/files   patch-Make.pthread 
  Log:
  Add port net/drawterm: a program that users of non-Plan 9 systems can use to establish graphical cpu(1) connections with
  Plan 9 CPU servers
  
  PR:             ports/163886
  Submitted by:   Winston Weinert <winstonw@lavabit.com> (maintainer)
  Approved by:    gabor (mentor, implicit)
  Feature safe:   Yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2434    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile

  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net/drawterm/distinfo (new)
